tools.installNotes: Provided by Microsoft App Installer. If missing, install App Installer from Microsoft Store.
Optional GUI client. The CLI workflow does not require it.
Installed by the official Python installer. If missing after Python install, repair Python and include the launcher feature.
Installed with Python. The bootstrapper can run python -m ensurepip when pip is missing.
Installed with the JDK.
Prefer adding Checkstyle per-project through Maven or Gradle instead of a global install.
Prefer adding SpotBugs per-project through Maven or Gradle.
Prefer adding PMD per-project through Maven or Gradle.
Installed with Node.js LTS.
Windows 11 includes curl.exe.
Windows-friendly make-style build helper.
Optional fast file search. The es.exe CLI may require enabling/installing the Everything command-line interface.
Official Microsoft power-user utilities. Validated through winget inventory because it is a GUI suite.
Official Microsoft diagnostics suite. Optional because it adds many utilities.
Modern cat-like file viewer with syntax highlighting.
Interactive fuzzy finder that pairs well with ripgrep and fd.
Readable syntax-highlighted Git diffs. The installer does not force Git config changes.
Cross-platform command runner for project tasks.
Smarter directory jumping. Shell profile integration is left to the user.
Command-line benchmarking for scripts and build steps.
Fast code statistics alternative to cloc/scc.
Cross-shell prompt. The installer does not edit shell profiles.
Prompt theming alternative to Starship. The installer does not edit shell profiles.
Project-aware runtime and tool version manager. Optional because this bootstrapper already installs base runtimes.
Optional Node version manager. Shell profile integration is left to the user.
Optional TypeScript-first runtime and toolchain.
Optional JavaScript runtime, package manager, and bundler.
Optional Rust toolchain manager. Useful for modern CLI development and Rust-backed tooling.
Optional Clang/LLVM toolchain.
Optional C/C++ package manager for native app projects.
Optional cloud CLI. Login is not performed or required by this bootstrapper.
Optional Azure infrastructure-as-code CLI.
Optional vulnerability and misconfiguration scanner.
Microsoft static analyzer for PowerShell scripts and modules.
PowerShell testing and mocking framework.
Optional Entity Framework Core CLI for .NET app development.
